humanAcceptance.evidence: Dave tested the immutable PR preview and approved this exact candidate.

requirements.expected: The exact player-visible or system outcome.
requirements.falsifier: A concrete observation that proves the outcome is still wrong.

evidence.note: The negative fixture fails on the old behaviour and passes on the candidate.

requirements.expected: The served composition matches the accepted target at representative viewports.
requirements.falsifier: Any representative capture still shows the reported defect.

evidence.note: Exercises the served route and asserts the affected surface.
Representative served-build capture reviewed by Dave.
